title: Concession: although, even so, still
subtitle: Hold two truths in the same answer.
duolingoBridge: B1 Med trains native-style but level-appropriate French: natural chunks, connected answers, listening strategy, and practical output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use concession to avoid black-and-white answers.
Knowledge point 2: finish with a clear conclusion.

items.fr: Bien que ce soit difficile, je trouve ce sujet très utile.
items.en: Although it is difficult, I find this topic very useful.
items.es: Aunque sea difícil, me parece un tema muy útil.

items.fr: Même si je comprends la règle, je dois encore la pratiquer.
items.en: Even if I understand the rule, I still have to practice it.
items.es: Aunque entiendo la regla, todavía tengo que practicarla.

items.fr: Cela dit, je ne veux pas apprendre trop de choses en même temps.
items.en: That said, I do not want to learn too many things at the same time.
items.es: Dicho eso, no quiero aprender demasiadas cosas al mismo tiempo.

items.fr: Je fais encore des erreurs, mais je continue quand même.
items.en: I still make mistakes, but I continue anyway.
items.es: Todavía cometo errores, pero continúo de todos modos.

items.fr: Au final, le plus important est de rester régulier.
items.en: In the end, the most important thing is to stay consistent.
items.es: Al final, lo más importante es mantenerse regular.
